headline: DOJ Subpoenas Put Bank Of America Regulatory And Valuation Risks In Focus
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has issued subpoenas to Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) as part of an investigation into potential politically motivated account closures. The inquiry focuses on whether certain customer groups faced discrimination related to their political activities or affiliations. At the same time, policymakers are discussing proposals that could reclassify Bank of America under a higher community bank threshold of up to $30 billion, which may bring stricter regulations. For...
